name: dinkmate
description: DinkMate — The premium pickleball social, matching & marketplace app

scripts.deploy:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('public/index.html','utf8'); const checks=['manifest','serviceWorker','DM_ANALYTICS']; checks.forEach(c => console.log((html.includes(c)?'✓':'✗')+' '+c)); console.log('Build check complete');"

author: DinkMate Team
